BatchAddDnatRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.ruleName: Rule name consisting of letters, digits, and special characters -\_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65, optional
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.publicIpAddress: Public IP address, an EIP or shared-bandwidth IP associated with the NAT gateway DNAT
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.protocol: Protocol, supports TCP, UDP, or all
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.publicPort: Public port (1-65535), valid when protocol is TCP or UDP, cannot be specified together with a port range
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.privatePort: Private port (1-65535), valid when protocol is TCP or UDP, cannot be specified together with a port range
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.publicPortRange: Public port range, e.g. "80-90", valid when protocol is TCP or UDP, cannot be specified together with a single port
BatchAddDnatRules.rules.privatePortRange: Private port range, e.g. "80-90", valid when protocol is TCP or UDP, cannot be specified together with a single port
